skill.name: firecrawl-scraper
skill.description: Deep web scraping, screenshots, PDF parsing, and website crawling using Firecrawl API
skill.summary: Deep web scraping, screenshots, PDF parsing, and website crawling using Firecrawl API
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All four static findings are false positives. The skill is legitimate documentation for the Firecrawl API web scraping tool. No malicious code, command injection, or prompt injection detected. The skill simply provides installation instructions and usage guidance for the Firecrawl API.

content.value_statement: Extract deep content from websites including text, screenshots, and PDFs using the Firecrawl API. Perfect for building datasets, monitoring competitors, or automating research.
actual_capabilities: Extract content from single URLs or batch process multiple URLs
Capture screenshots of web pages for visual documentation
Parse PDF documents for text extraction
Crawl entire websites with configurable depth and limits
Handle JavaScript-rendered pages through headless browser rendering
Clean and structure scraped data in multiple formats
limitations: Requires a Firecrawl API key for usage
Rate limited by Firecrawl API quotas
Cannot bypass paywalls or authentication-protected content
Some websites may block scraping based on robots.txt rules

use_cases.title: Research Data Collection
use_cases.description: Automate gathering of publicly available data from multiple sources for research projects, market analysis, or competitive intelligence.
use_cases.target_user: Researchers, data analysts, and business analysts

use_cases.title: Content Archival
use_cases.description: Capture and archive web content including screenshots and PDFs for documentation, compliance, or offline access.
use_cases.target_user: Content managers, compliance officers, and archivists

use_cases.title: Lead Generation
use_cases.description: Extract contact information, company details, and other relevant data from business directories and websites.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Page Scraping
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the firecrawl-scraper skill to extract all text content from [URL]
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need to quickly extract text from a single web page

prompt_templates.title: Screenshot Capture
prompt_templates.prompt: Use firecrawl-scraper to take a screenshot of [URL] and save it
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need visual documentation of a web page

prompt_templates.title: Batch URL Extraction
prompt_templates.prompt: Use firecrawl-scraper to scrape content from these URLs: [list of URLs]. Extract the main content from each and provide a summary.
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need to gather data from multiple sources at once

prompt_templates.title: PDF Document Parsing
prompt_templates.prompt: Use firecrawl-scraper to extract text from [PDF URL or upload]
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need to extract content from PDF documents

output_examples.output: Successfully extracted article content. Title: 'Getting Started with Firecrawl'. Content length: 2500 words. Found 3 images and 5 internal links.
Screenshot saved to [filename].png. Page loaded successfully with all JavaScript rendered.

best_practices: Configure your Firecrawl API key as an environment variable before use
Start with single URL extraction before attempting batch operations
Respect website terms of service and robots.txt when scraping
Use appropriate delays between requests to avoid rate limiting
anti_patterns: Do not use for scraping protected content behind login walls without authorization
Avoid aggressive crawling that may impact target website performance
Do not use for bypassing paid access or subscription content
Avoid scraping personal data without proper consent and compliance with privacy laws

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a Firecrawl API key. Sign up at firecrawl.dev to get your API key.

faq.question: Can this skill bypass authentication?
faq.answer: No, this skill cannot access content behind login walls or authentication. It only scrapes publicly accessible content.

faq.question: Is web scraping legal?
faq.answer: It depends on the website and jurisdiction. Always respect robots.txt and terms of service. Do not scrape personal data without consent.

faq.question: Can I scrape infinite pages from a website?
faq.answer: No, you should set reasonable limits. Configure crawl depth and page limits to avoid overloading target websites.

faq.question: What formats can Firecrawl extract?
faq.answer: Firecrawl can extract markdown, HTML, text, screenshots (PNG/JPG), and parse PDFs for text content.

faq.question: How do I handle rate limiting?
faq.answer: Configure appropriate delays between requests. Check Firecrawl API documentation for rate limit details and consider upgrading your plan for higher limits.
